title: デイリーブリーフ 6/21 — 腸×健康／日米スタートアップ／最新AI
description: こんにちは。デイリーブリーフ、2026年6月21日の回です。今日は五つの話題をお届けします。主役は、腸と健康のサイエンス、そして腸活スタートアップの日米の動き。続いて、最新テクノロジー、お茶業界、アマゾンの最新情報を軽めに添えます。それでは始めましょう。 最初は今日の主役、腸と脳の科学です。いま注目を集めているのが、サイコバイオティクス、つまり心の状態に働きかける善玉菌という考え方です。背景には、腸と脳が双方向に信号をやり取りしているという理解があります。たとえば、体内のセロトニンのおよそ九割五分は、実は腸でつくられています。腸内の細菌は、このセロトニンに加えて、気持ちを落ち着かせるギャバや、

title: Daily Brief Jun 21 (English) — Gut health, startups, latest AI
description: Hello, and welcome to your Daily Brief for June twenty-first, twenty twenty-six. Today we have five stories. The headliners are the science of the gut and health, and the moves shaping gut-health startups in Japan and the United States. After that, we'll add lighter notes on the latest technology, t

title: デイリーブリーフ 2026-06-22
description:
腸活の科学は便通から気分・睡眠・腸脳相関へ広がり、2026年の鍵は個別化・科学的証拠・多機能の三つ。米国ではデジタルヘルスへ再び資金が戻り、腸活はスタートアップから巨大食品メーカーまでの激戦区で、AIと微生物を掛けた個別化が未来の先行指標となっている。あわせてAIモデル競争の新段階、抹茶の品薄継続、アマゾン広告の単価上昇と意図ベース化を取り上げた。

Sources:
- Empirical evidence of the neuroactive potential of the gut on neurochemistry in the gut-brain axis in humans (bioRxiv): https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.05.07.652653.full.pdf
- Gut microbiota in irritable bowel syndrome: mechanisms and microbiome-based therapies (PMC): https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12631637/
- Bifidobacterium supplementation maintains gut microbiota stability during short-term travel (Frontiers in Nutrition 2026): https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/nutrition/articles/10.3389/fnut.2026.1724829/full
- Probiotic for Gut Health, Recruiting Participants for Clinical Trial 2026 (Power): https://www.withpower.com/trial/phase-2026-6be83
- 2026 gut health essentials: Personalization, evidence and multi-benefit claims (Nutrition Insight): https://www.nutritioninsight.com/news/gut-health-trends-2026-biotics-personalized-nutrition.html
- Digital health startups raked in $4B in Q1 2026 (Fierce Healthcare / Rock Health): https://www.fiercehealthcare.com/digital-health/digital-health-startups-raked-4b-q1-12-megadeals-driving-investment-rock-health
- Gut Health Startup Good Bacteria Raises $3.2M (Beauty Independent): https://www.beautyindependent.com/gut-health-startup-good-bacteria-raises-3-2m-probiotic-supplement-business/
- Anto, foundation model for gut microbiomes (Y Combinator): https://www.ycombinator.com/companies/anto
- AI-powered biotech startup Gutgutgoose accepted into Y Combinator (Business News Australia): https://www.businessnewsaustralia.com/articles/ai-powered-biotech-startup-gutgutgoose-accepted-into-silicon-valleys-y-combinator.html
- LLM News Today June 2026, AI Model Releases (LLM-Stats): https://llm-stats.com/ai-news
- Top AI News for June 2026: Breakthroughs, Launches and Trends (AIapps): https://www.aiapps.com/blog/ai-news-breakthroughs-launches-trends-must-read/
- Matcha Shortage 2026: A Founder Explains What's Happening (One with Tea): https://onewithtea.com/blogs/news/2026-matcha-shortage-explained
- Japan's Matcha Crisis: 170% Price Surge (Vision Times): https://www.visiontimes.com/2026/02/12/japans-matcha-crisis-how-a-170-price-surge-exposed-the-fragility-of-a-centuries-old-industry.html
- Amazon Sponsored Products CPC hits record high before Prime Day (Nova Analytics): https://novadata.io/resources/news/amazon-sponsored-products-cpc-record-high-june-2026
- Amazon's 2026 Algorithm Update and COSMO (Algofy): https://www.algofy.com/post/amazons-2026-algorithm-update-what-changed-and-how-to-adapt-your-strategy-now

title: Daily Brief 2026-06-22 (English)
